prestazioni: Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport 92.0mm forged pistons (86.5mm stroke, 2,495cc) and Carillo H-beam connecting rods for 300Tdi (25L20/25L26) to handle 400+ lb-ft of torque, paired with a Garrett GT3582R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with Bell Auto Services anti-lag system for instant spool at 1,800 RPM

Full custom ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (UK) with bespoke fueling for 50/50 E85-RON98 blend, targeting 32 psi boost (2.2 bar) with a Pierburg 0 580 464 072 high-flow fuel pump and 1,000cc Siemens Deka 80lb/hr injectors, retaining the stock Bosch VP37 injection pump but upgraded with a 12mm plunger kit from Diesel Performance Tuning (DPT)

Custom 4.7:1 low-range transfer case gearset by Quaife Engineering (QKE80A) with a reinforced output shaft and ARB RD125 air locker for the rear diff, paired with a 3.54:1 front diff ratio (stock 3.31:1) and a 3.73:1 rear diff ratio (stock 3.54:1) for improved crawl control, all mated to a reinforced R380 gearbox with upgraded synchros from ZF Sachs
estetica: Full custom Safari-style expedition cage by Safety Devices (UK) with integrated roof rack mounts and side-mounted spare wheel carriers, powder-coated in RAL 1021 (Camel Trophy Yellow) with black anodized hardware, featuring a front-mounted WARN Zeon 12-S winch with synthetic rope and a custom aluminum fairlead by Mantec 4x4

Bespoke aluminum body panels by JGS 4x4 (UK) including a vented hood with NACA ducts for the intercooler, reinforced front fenders with integrated LED light pods (Hella Rallye 4000), and a rear aluminum tub with a swing-out spare wheel carrier, all finished in a textured Line-X XS-100 coating for impact resistance

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-XL seats (retaining original Camel Trophy embroidery) wrapped in waterproof marine-grade vinyl, a custom aluminum dashboard by Rally Design with a Motec C127 dash display, and a full roll cage integration with Sparco 6-point harnesses and a custom center console housing a dual-battery system (Optima YellowTop) and a 12V air compressor
